## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (fmt + vet + tests)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Golden files regenerated (`go test ./internal/adapters/... -update`) if adapter output changed, with the diff explained
- [ ] Docs updated (README / `site/content/docs/`) if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Adapter output changes cite the official target docs they were validated against
